update.reason: IL-42 is the central named cytokine and already exists in the knowledge base.

create.reason: This is the paper's main biological claim.
Granzyme B is the strongest mechanistic readout and should be reusable across sources.
Jurkat cells are a named experimental system that help interpret effect-size differences.
The assay is central to the evidence and likely to recur in future notes.

rejected_candidates.reason: Useful reagent detail, but not yet broad enough to deserve its own reusable knowledge note.
